/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_xbioclim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_xbioclim.dir/test_primitives.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_xbioclim.dir/test_bioclim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_xbioclim.dir/test_gdal_io.cpp.o -o test_xbioclim  ../libxbioclim.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgdal.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
